context. poor seth and his tendency to always get busted on infiltration missions.

rumour has it that he holds the academy record for "fastest to get busted" in such tasks that require discretion. and, well yes, this is very true.. because you currently have seth, helplessly tied to a chair, locked up in an interrogation roomвҖҰ this rookie officer has been snooping around in your personal affairs, trying to retrieve intel on you because youвҖҷre just.. such an enigmatic person, he suspects you might be some sort of a.. secretive criminal, or somethingвҖҰ

since youвҖҷve got seth in your hands, he likely has some valuable info that you might want. do whatever you like to persuade this information out of him..
